Question:

QAcademy — Question feedback (Timed quiz)
Course: Medicine & Medical Nursing(RN)
Question: 5 of 5
Topic: Hematology : Anemia presentations

Question:
A 22-year-old woman reports persistent tiredness, reduced exercise tolerance, and dizziness on mild exertion. Examination reveals pallor and tachycardia. What is the cardinal symptom most associated with anemia?

Options (as shown):
A. Polyuria
B. Fever
C. Cough
D. Fatigue

My answer: D — Fatigue

QAcademy — Question feedback (Timed quiz)
Course: General Paper
Question: 1 of 100
Topic: Fundamentals

Question:
Which of the following best defines the nursing process?

Options (as shown):
A. A tool used for financial auditing
B. A method of documentation used in hospitals
C. A checklist used by nurses
D. A systematic problem-solving approach to patient care

My answer: A — A tool used for financial auditing

QAcademy — Question feedback (Instant quiz)
Course: Surgery & Surgical Nursing(RN)
Question: 2 of 10
Topic: Orthopedics

Question:
Following orthopedic surgery, which sign suggests fat embolism?

Options (as shown):
A. Tachycardia with bounding pulse
B. Fever and wound swelling
C. Hematuria and back pain
D. Petechiae on chest, dyspnea, confusion

My answer: C — Hematuria and back pain

Options (as shown):
A. Hypothermia
B. Jaundice
C. Hypertension
D. Tachycardia

QAcademy - Question feedback (Timed quiz)
Course: Medicine & Medical Nursing(RN)
Question: 1 of 5
Topic: Nutrition:Iron Deficiency

Question:
What dietary advice is appropriate for a client with iron deficiency anemia?

Options (as shown):
A. Drink tea with meals
B. Avoid red meats
C. Avoid citrus fruits
D. Include leafy greens and organ meats

My answer: D - Include leafy greens and organ meats
